note: CONSTRUCTED single-domain demo incidents. These are deliberately synthetic (NOT real detections) and are added only so the dashboard shows the full decision spectrum (step-up / throttle) alongside the real, corroborated REVOKE incidents (E027/E028/E029). Same honesty discipline as demo_scenarios.json: anything constructed is labeled. Entity IDs E9xx denote constructed demo entities.

reasons.raw_value: CONSTRUCTED demo incident (not a real detection): a strong transactional fraud score with NO behavioral corroboration. Single domain -> confidence low -> STEP-UP verification, deliberately NOT auto-revoke. Illustrates correlation-based false-positive reduction.
CONSTRUCTED demo incident (not a real detection): a moderate off-hours behavioral flag with no transactional corroboration. Single domain -> confidence low -> THROTTLE / watch.
